rationale: This thesis initiates a BUY position because the RSI(14) is 61.13, satisfying the strict requirement to BUY only if RSI < 65 [technical_data]. While the MACD histogram is negative, the forward P/E of 28.0 remains comfortably below the sell trigger of 1.5x sector average, supporting a valuation-based entry in a neutral macro regime.
